chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 209 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 12.06.2025 Mr. Muhammad Raza Soomro, Advocate for the Petitioner Mr. Sheeraz Fazal, Advocate for Respondents/University Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the respondents/University submits that respondents have filed a statement along with schedule of payment of the outstanding amount of the petitioner. Counsel also submits that by way of two cheques dated 12.05.2025 and 12.06.2025 they have already made payment of the LPR. However, the remaining Commutation amount of Rs.23,36,263/- will be paid according to the schedule appended with the statement. Learned counsel for the petitioner expressed his satisfaction. The petition is disposed of in the above terms. In case of non-compliance the violator may face the contempt proceedings. Judge Judge ARBROHI
